description_for_human: Convert your CV to a website and browse 6,000+ tech jobs with personalized skill matching.
description_for_model: CVin.Bio is a platform with two core features: (1) Upload a PDF CV to generate a personal website profile at a custom URL, and (2) Browse a job board with 6,000+ tech listings from 60+ companies (Stripe, Airbnb, Coinbase, Discord, etc.) with AI-powered skill matching. Users can search by title, company, location, and job type. The job board is free to use and refreshes every 3 days.
